zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Smith於1569年3月23日出生在英國英格蘭艾可時，她的父親Smith11566歲，母親Mrs. Smith11566歲。她於1592年與John Goodrich在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲聖 馬也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1645年之後在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲。

nameMeanings.name: Smith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

variants.name: Smither
meanings: English (Surrey): occupational name from Middle English smith(i)ere, smeth(i)ere ‘blacksmith’, a derivative of Middle English smithen, smethen, ‘to make (something) in metal, to forge’. Compare Smith .

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

variants.name: Smyth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ronan, Aidan, Brigid, Conor, Eoin, Malachy, Paddy.
English: variant of   Smith  . This form of the surname is particularly common Ireland.

variants.name: McGowan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Siobhan, Cormac, Seamus, Aileen, Colm, Eithne, Kieran, Niall, Paddy.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (a') Ghobhainn or Mac Gobhann (Scottish) or Mac (an) Ghabhann (Irish), ‘son of (the) smith’. This name has also been Anglicized as Smith and Smithson .

variants.name: Smead
meanings: occupational name from Middle English smeth(e) ‘smith’, a phonetic variant of Smith 1 that was widespread in medieval England, especially in south-eastern and south-western counties.

topographic, occupational, and habitational name from Middle English smethe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smethe), a side form of Smith 2, for someone who lived and worked at a blacksmith's, or who lived in or came from a place so named, such as Smeeth (Kent) or Smeed Farm in Hastingleigh (Kent). Compare the synonymous Smithey .

variants.name: Faber
meanings: German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Danish; Slovak and Czech (mainly Fáber): occupational name from Latin faber ‘blacksmith’. At the time of the Reformation, it was much used as a humanistic name, a translation into Latin of vernacular surnames such as German Schmidt and Dutch Smit . Compare Fabri and Fauber .

History: In North America, this surname was originally also part of a title. It was François Lefebvre, sieur Duplessis Faber from Paris, France, whose title sieur Duplessis Faber was shortened into the surname Faber. He married Marie-Madeleine Chorel in Champlain, QC, in 1689.

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Smith was born on 23 March 1569, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Smith, was 11566 and her mother, Mrs. Smith, was 11566. She married John Goodrich in 1592, in St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 1645, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Martha Smith est née le 23 mars 1569, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Smith, avait 11566 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Smith, avait 11566 ans. Elle a épousé John Goodrich en 1592, à St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 1645, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Martha Smithが1569年3月23日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Smithは11566歳，母Mrs. Smithは11566歳であった。1592年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズスト マリ'ス チャーチでJohn Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1645年以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Smith(이)가 1569년 3월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Smith(은)는 11566세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Smith(은)는 11566세였다. 그녀는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치에서 John Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1645년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Martha Smith nasceu em 23 de março de 1569, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Smith, tinha 11566 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Smith, tinha 11566 anos. Ela casou-se com John Goodrich em 1592, em St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1645, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Smith родилась 23 марта 1569 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Smith было 11566 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Smith, 11566. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Goodrich в 1592 г. в местности ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 1645 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Martha Smith nació el 23 de marzo de 1569, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Smith, tenía 11566 años y su mamá, Mrs. Smith, tenía 11566 años. Se casó con John Goodrich en 1592, en St Mary's Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió después de 1645, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
